title: Shin-Ichi Hiromoto
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Shin-Ichi Hiromoto''' (born [[January 3]], [[1960s#1966|1966]]), born as ヒロモト 森一, ''Hirotomo Shin'ichi''), also written as '''Hiromoto-SIN-Ichi''' was the manga illustrator for the [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi]] series and the story ''[[Perfect Evil]]'' in [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga]]. He has a unique art style that is somewhat jagged and evokes a more intense look to the characters, heightening the gritty, "used" look of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga.

Other times, Hiromoto may use this same style to get a more humorous point across, such as the many times that characters represented grow larger than normal hands for usually comedic reasons.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars: The Complete Vader]]''
